channel.title: Ros Altmann
channel.description: Dr. Ros Altmann - investment expert, investment banker, economist and pensions industry adviser

item.title: Homeowners ripping tax-free equity from their property to give to family
item.dc:creator: Ros Altmann
item.description:
Ros is quoted in Yahoo website explaining that people need to think carefully before taking out an equity release loan. ( link to pdf )

The post Homeowners ripping tax-free equity from their property to give to family appeared first on Ros Altmann.
item.content:encoded:
Ros is quoted in Yahoo website explaining that people need to think carefully before taking out an equity release loan. (link to pdf)

The post Homeowners ripping tax-free equity from their property to give to family appeared first on Ros Altmann.

item.title: Government urged to rethink ‘irrational’ and ‘sinister’ treatment of REITs in pension bill
item.dc:creator: Ros Altmann
item.description:
Ros is quoted by CoStar urging the Government to rethink its irrational treatment of investment trusts and REITs in the Pension Schemes Bill. ( link to pdf )

The post Government urged to rethink ‘irrational’ and ‘sinister’ treatment of REITs in pension bill appeared first on Ros Altmann.
item.content:encoded:
Ros is quoted by CoStar urging the Government to rethink its irrational treatment of investment trusts and REITs in the Pension Schemes Bill. (link to pdf)

The post Government urged to rethink ‘irrational’ and ‘sinister’ treatment of REITs in pension bill appeared first on Ros Altmann.

item.title: Why the state pension was doomed to fail 80 years ago
item.dc:creator: Ros Altmann
item.description:
The Daily Telegraph quotes Ros explaining that Government has raided pensions time and again over the years.

The post Why the state pension was doomed to fail 80 years ago appeared first on Ros Altmann.
item.content:encoded:
The Daily Telegraph quotes Ros explaining that Government has raided pensions time and again over the years.

The post Why the state pension was doomed to fail 80 years ago appeared first on Ros Altmann.

item.title: Britons Face Fines Over Inheritance Tax on Pensions, Lords Warn
item.dc:creator: Ros Altmann
item.description:
Ros is quoted on Bloomberg warning of the potential nightmare for bereaved loved ones who will have to find all pensions, work out how much inheritance tax, if any, is due and pay the money or make sure beneficiaries pay it, within just a few months – this will probably prove unworkable and will certainly cause misery and loss for some.

The post Britons Face Fines Over Inheritance Tax on Pensions, Lords Warn appeared first on Ros Altmann.
item.content:encoded:
Ros is quoted on Bloomberg warning of the potential nightmare for bereaved loved ones who will have to find all pensions, work out how much inheritance tax, if any, is due and pay the money or make sure beneficiaries pay it, within just a few months – this will probably prove unworkable and will certainly cause misery and loss for some.

The post Britons Face Fines Over Inheritance Tax on Pensions, Lords Warn appeared first on Ros Altmann.

item.title: Pension Schemes Bill debate in House of Lords highlights scale mandate concerns We’re glad to see that you may be inspiring others with our journalistic content. We ask that you copy our content for personal use only, so as not to violate our Terms and Conditions. Otherwise, ask about our group memberships via lorenzo.passarella@ipe.com. Text copied from: https://www.ipe.com/news/pension-schemes-bill-debate-in-house-of-lords-highlights-scale-mandate-concerns/10134827.article
item.dc:creator: Ros Altmann
item.description:
Ros was quoted IPE (Investment and Pensions Europe) commenting on the Pension Schemes Bill £25billion scale requirements and warning this could stifle innovation, without ensuring better outcomes for members. ( link to pdf )

The post Pension Schemes Bill debate in House of Lords highlights scale mandate concerns <br><br>We’re glad to see that you may be inspiring others with our journalistic content. We ask that you copy our content for personal use only, so as not to violate our Terms and Conditions. Otherwise, ask about our group memberships via <a href="mailto:lorenzo.passarella@ipe.com">lorenzo.passarella@ipe.com</a>. item.content:encoded:
Ros was quoted IPE (Investment and Pensions Europe) commenting on the Pension Schemes Bill £25billion scale requirements and warning this could stifle innovation, without ensuring better outcomes for members. (link to pdf)

The post Pension Schemes Bill debate in House of Lords highlights scale mandate concerns <br><br>We’re glad to see that you may be inspiring others with our journalistic content. item.title: Boaz Weinstein and Saba undeterred so what now for investment trusts?
item.dc:creator: Ros Altmann
item.description:
Ros was quoted by The Herald warning of the weakness of shareholder protections against the hedge fund takeover of long-standing and successful investment trusts.

The post Boaz Weinstein and Saba undeterred so what now for investment trusts? appeared first on Ros Altmann.
item.content:encoded:
Ros was quoted by The Herald warning of the weakness of shareholder protections against the hedge fund takeover of long-standing and successful investment trusts.

The post Boaz Weinstein and Saba undeterred so what now for investment trusts? appeared first on Ros Altmann.

item.title: Insights from Baroness Ros Altmann on the future of pensions and IHT
item.dc:creator: Ros Altmann
item.description:
Ros gave a Webinar for ProVen explaining the upcoming changes for Business and Agricultural Property Reliefs, VCTs and Inheritance Tax on Pensions. ( link to pdf )

The post Insights from Baroness Ros Altmann on the future of pensions and IHT appeared first on Ros Altmann.
item.content:encoded:
Ros gave a Webinar for ProVen explaining the upcoming changes for Business and Agricultural Property Reliefs, VCTs and Inheritance Tax on Pensions. (link to pdf)

The post Insights from Baroness Ros Altmann on the future of pensions and IHT appeared first on Ros Altmann.

item.title: UK Pension Schemes Bill surplus rules favour employers over members, peers warn We’re glad to see that you may be inspiring others with our journalistic content. We ask that you copy our content for personal use only, so as not to violate our Terms and Conditions. Otherwise, ask about our group memberships via lorenzo.passarella@ipe.com. Text copied from: https://www.ipe.com/news/uk-pension-schemes-bill-surplus-rules-favour-employers-over-members-peers-warn/10134671.article
item.dc:creator: Ros Altmann
item.description:
Ros is quoted by IPE (Investment and Pensions Europe) highlighting the need for trustees to pay more attention to member interests when deciding to distribute surpluses, but the Pension Schemes Bill should do more to facilitate or encourage this.

The post UK Pension Schemes Bill surplus rules favour employers over members, peers warn <br><br>We’re glad to see that you may be inspiring others with our journalistic content. We ask that you copy our content for personal use only, so as not to violate our Terms and Conditions. Otherwise, ask about our group memberships via <a href="mailto:lorenzo.passarella@ipe.com">lorenzo.passarella@ipe.com</a>. Text copied from: https://www.ipe.com/news/uk-pension-schemes-bill-surplus-rules-favour-employers-over-members-peers-warn/10134671.article appeared first on Ros Altmann.
item.content:encoded:
Ros is quoted by IPE (Investment and Pensions Europe) highlighting the need for trustees to pay more attention to member interests when deciding to distribute surpluses, but the Pension Schemes Bill should do more to facilitate or encourage this.

The post UK Pension Schemes Bill surplus rules favour employers over members, peers warn <br><br>We’re glad to see that you may be inspiring others with our journalistic content. We ask that you copy our content for personal use only, so as not to violate our Terms and Conditions. Otherwise, ask about our group memberships via <a href="mailto:lorenzo.passarella@ipe.com">lorenzo.passarella@ipe.com</a>. item.title: Protect your portfolio: How to fight back against hedge fund aggression in UK investment trusts
item.dc:creator: Ros Altmann
item.description:
Ros wrote an article for CityAM urging investors in Edinburgh Worldwide Investment Trust to make sure they vote to protect their long-term interests against short-term raids. ( link to pdf )

The post Protect your portfolio: How to fight back against hedge fund aggression in UK investment trusts appeared first on Ros Altmann.
item.content:encoded:
Ros wrote an article for CityAM urging investors in Edinburgh Worldwide Investment Trust to make sure they vote to protect their long-term interests against short-term raids. (link to pdf)

The post Protect your portfolio: How to fight back against hedge fund aggression in UK investment trusts appeared first on Ros Altmann.

item.title: State pensioners with £10,000 savings risk having DWP perk stripped away
item.dc:creator: Ros Altmann
item.description:
Ros is quoted in the Birmingham Mail commenting on the possibility of pensioners with some savings losing out on Pension Credit help without realising it.

The post State pensioners with £10,000 savings risk having DWP perk stripped away appeared first on Ros Altmann.
item.content:encoded:
Ros is quoted in the Birmingham Mail commenting on the possibility of pensioners with some savings losing out on Pension Credit help without realising it.

The post State pensioners with £10,000 savings risk having DWP perk stripped away appeared first on Ros Altmann.
